result:
All 30 tests pass. Here's what was added:

- **`status`** — prints staged files or `(none)` if empty
- **`diff <c1> <c2>`** — compares two commits, reports Added/Removed/Modified files
- **`checkout <hash>`** — restores working files from commit, updates HEAD, clears index
- **`reset <hash>`** — moves HEAD to commit without touching working files, clears index
- **`rm <file>`** — removes a file from the index (fails if not staged)
- **`show <hash>`** — displays commit metadata and file list with 2-space indent
